---
title: "Diagram 4: Public transport simulation"
date: "2026-03-15"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Diagram 4: Public transport simulation pipeline

- Bus & tram data from tfl.gov
- Prices from realprices.info <!-- uncertain: "reel preus.info" — likely a real prices data source -->

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    bus(("Bus data"))
    tram(("Tram data"))
    prices(("Prices"))
    pt["Public Transport"]
    sim["Simulation"]
    qt["Quality Table"]
    dash((("exposure: Dashboard")))
    result((("exposure: result_table")))

    bus --> pt
    tram --> pt
    prices --> sim
    pt --> sim
    sim --> qt
    sim --> dash
    sim --> result
```

::: {.callout-caution title="Skill uncertainty notes" collapse="true"}
- "reel preus.info" — normalized to "realprices.info"; exact domain unknown
- "Qvelity Table" / "Quality Table" — handwriting ambiguous between q/Q and v
:::
